case_title: NGOC (WINNIE) PHUNG ET AL VS. ABRAHAM WOO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-22-2017 - JUDGMENT.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHUNG, NGOC (WINNIE) QIU, HUGO AS TO DEFENDANT WOO, ABRAHAM T.
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF PHUNG, NGOC (WINNIE) QIU, HUGO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-22-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-22-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WINNIE NGOC PHUNG APPEARED. DEFENDANT ABRAHAM WOO DID NOT APPEAR. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $100.00) SERVED MAY-01-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WOO, ABRAHAM T.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PHUNG, NGOC (WINNIE) QIU, HUGO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOO, ABRAHAM T. $3,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,550.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,400.00 FILED BY PHUNG, NGOC (WINNIE) QIU, HUGO AS TO DEFENDANT WOO, ABRAHAM T. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-22-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $3,673.56 (LOS ANGELES SHERIFF'S DEPT. RETAINS POSSESSION OF THE ORIGINAL WRIT PER CCP. 263.7) AS TO DEFENDANT WOO, ABRAHAM T.
